evidence_excerpt: Now at 24 months of age, the child is developmentally normal except sandal gap toe. Table notes at 2 y weight at 3rd %ile and neurodevelopment normal.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Neonatal course was largely uncomplicated; at 24 months development normal except sandal gap toe.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: At 34 weeks of gestation vaginal bleeding ensued and labor was induced for suspected abruption.
At 24 months of age, the child is developmentally normal except sandal gap toe.
Table 1: tonsillectomy at 2 y of age.

notes_on_uncertainty: The record describes two cases. This summary pertains to Case 2 (26-year-old primigravida with placental biopsy at 19 weeks showing triploidy and fetal karyotype 46,XY). Long-term data available to 24 months; minor residual issues (sandal gap toe, low weight percentile) are noted but overall development is normal.
